CAUSES OF ACTIONS 1 THROUGH 4 ARE STRICKEN, BECAUSE THEY ARISE FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT CANNOT OVERCOME THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE. CROSS-DEFENDANT IS AWARDED HIS FEES AND COSTS ON THIS MOTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,390.00 TO BE PAID WITHIN 60 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. Off Calendar Mar-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. J. TIMOTHY NARDELL OF NARDELL CHITSAZ & ASSOCIATES, LLP,
TEL. NO. 485-2200 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. PATRICK MISSUD, TEL. NO. 584-7251 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFFS DAVID TSAI AND ROSE TSAI'S Motion And Anti-Slapp Motion To Strike First, Second, Third And Fourth Causes Of Action From Cross-Complaint IS GRANTED. CAUSES OF ACTIONS 1 THROUGH 4 ARE STRICKEN, BECAUSE THEY ARISE FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT CANNOT OVERCOME THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE. CROSS-DEFENDANT IS AWARDED HIS FEES AND COSTS ON THIS MOTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,390.00 to be paid within 60 days of the date of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Nicci Rodich, CSR # 11604 =301/PJB
